scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/shared run build && pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/* run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/backend run test && pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/frontend run test:run
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/backend run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/frontend run test:coverage
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @cold-blood-cast/* exec rm -rf node_modules dist .nuxt .output && rm -rf node_modules
